title: On Loving God
description: Bernard's four degrees of love: loving self for self's sake, loving God for self's sake, loving God for God's sake, loving self for God's sake.
introduction: Bernard's four degrees of love: loving self for self's sake, loving God for self's sake, loving God for God's sake, loving self for God's sake.

translation.text: The reason for loving God is God himself. The measure of loving God is to love without measure.
